_description: Template describing the bias-audit record emitted per ranking run. The live values are written into compliance/audit_trail/audit_<timestamp>.json by src/compliance.py.
intervention_policy: Audit-and-log by default (no forced re-rank). Bounded DELTR-style adjustment available in production where legal parity is mandated.
notes: A region skew toward India is expected and lawful for this JD (it targets Pune/Noida + Tier-1 Indian cities). The audit records rather than masks it.
